creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
Update math/gnumeric to 0.44

	Note:

	GUILE support has been forcibly removed, since it is currently
	suffering from extreme bit-rot (the rest of gnumeric has changed
	so as to make this plugin uncompilable).

Fix: Apply following patch:

Version:	0.41 -> 0.44
Changes:	Makefile files/md5 patches/patch-aa patches/patch-bh
		pkg/PLIST
Adds:		patches/patch-bo patches/patch-bp
Removes:	NONE

cvs diff: Diffing .
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
